name: BeaverTail
description: [BeaverTail](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1246) is a malware that has both a JavaScript and C++ variant.  Active since 2022, [BeaverTail](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1246) is capable of stealing logins from browsers and serves as a downloader for second stage payloads. [BeaverTail](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1246) has previously been leveraged by North Korea-affiliated actors
